PowerShell($req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\("http://127.0.0.1:8000/auth/google"\); $req.AllowAutoRedirect = $false; try { $res = $req.GetResponse\(\); "Status: $\($res.StatusCode\)"; "Location: $\($res.Headers['Location']\)"; $res.Close\(\) } catch [System.Net.WebException] { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)"; "Location: $\($_.Exception.Response.Headers['Location']\)"; $_.Exception.Response.Close\(\) } else { "No response: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
